title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Naukri Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Naukri Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Naukri Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Naukri Digital Technologies:
Naukri Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri Digital Technologies!
